Engineering & Development

LLMs [...] and press down with a haptic; and the tiny counter in the status bar shows how many strangers are writing right now, never who, never what. And one honest study, since "handwriting is better" gets thrown around loosely: a 2024 EEG study (Frontiers in Psychology) found handwriting produces far more widespread brain connectivity than typing. Modest, real, cited on our site.

If you've ever abandoned notebook number four in a drawer, I built this for you. Tell me about it and I'll tell you which of Pennen's decisions came from mine. I'm here all day.

results.title: The 12 Best Handwriting Into Text App Options for 2026
results.content:
| Microsoft OneNote | Ink-to-Text/Math, cross-platform, M365 integration | ★★★½ — reliable in many builds | ✨Bundled with Microsoft 365; Teams/Office integration 🏆 | 👥 Organizations on M365 | 💰Free with M365 / free tier |
| Apple Notes + Scribble | Real-time Scribble, system-wide handwriting input | ★★★½ — seamless on-device | ✨On-device privacy & system-wide Scribble | 👥 Apple ecosystem & casual users | 💰Free (built-in) |
| Samsung Notes | Convert handwriting pages, Word export, Galaxy AI | ★★★½ — great on S Pen devices | ✨Deep S Pen integration; Galaxy AI on supported models | 👥 Samsung device fleets | 💰Free; device-dependent features | [...] Website: 

# 6. Samsung Notes

For users embedded in the Samsung ecosystem, Samsung Notes offers a native and deeply integrated handwriting into text app experience. Available on Galaxy devices, especially those with an S Pen, it allows for seamless conversion of handwritten notes directly on the device. Its primary function is to let users select handwritten passages or entire pages and instantly transform them into typed text, which is ideal for digitizing meeting notes or field observations quickly without needing a third-party application.

handwriting-into-text-app-ai-notes.jpg

handwriting-into-text-app-ai-notes.jpg [...] Website: 

# 7. Pen to Print

Pen to Print is a specialized handwriting into text app designed for one primary purpose: turning existing physical documents into editable digital text. Unlike real-time note-taking apps, its strength is in processing images of handwritten pages from notebooks, letters, meeting minutes, or forms. This makes it a great tool for businesses in logistics or finance looking to digitize archives of handwritten records, like old ledgers or field service reports, without retyping everything manually.

handwriting-into-text-app-ocr-app.jpg

handwriting-into-text-app-ocr-app.jpg

Start with a 7-day free trial to get the full experience — then choose to upgrade to keep all features, or continue with a free limited version. ———————— DIGITAL HANDWRITING • Write¹, type or dictate in the same page, sentence or even word. • Accurately convert handwriting and math to typed text, and drawn diagrams to perfect shapes. Diagrams stay editable when pasted into PowerPoint! • Write emoji and symbols with your pen. • Highlight ideas live with a glowing laser pointer — no marks left behind. • Draw straight lines with the ruler — [...] that I cannot input a page of a pdf into an existing text document, can only add it in a separate page. That’s frustrating. Even the text document input is annoying. Why is everything automatically double-spaced? If I am typing and press enter to enter a line of text beneath the current line,like this,Nebo will instead open a new text bubble and leave the old one behind. So this means I have to type everything out, then go back with the buggy pen-gestures, to get everything connected together again in a way that makes sense. All I wanted was a decent replacement to OneNote and if I don’t hear from the developper in a week I will have to get my money back and resume using onenote. Even for how garbage OneNote is, it’s still not as buggy as this app. [...] 4+
